Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class UserModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
public class UserModel extends Object
UserModel class handles all database operations related to User. It provides methods for: - CRUD operations (Add, Update, Delete) - Authentication - Password management (change/forget) - Search with pagination - User registration with email notification This class interacts with ST_USER table.
Author:
Ram
